title: lastrea goeringiana
intro: Lastrea goeringiana, also known as the Chinese fern or lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea goeringiana include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and improving respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lastrea goeringiana can be made into teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
